items.title: Road Paint
items.description: An interactive browser sketch — drag to paint roads that unfurl across a low-poly landscape, rendered in real time with Three.js.
items.fullDescription:
Road Paint is a playful, interactive browser toy. Dragging across the screen lays down ribbons of road that wind through a bright, low-poly world rendered live in the browser with WebGL (Three.js).

It began as a study in gesture and generative form: the road is authored by the movement of the hand, and the landscape assembles itself around the marks you leave. There is no goal and no score — only the pleasure of drawing space into being and watching it hold together.

Open the interactive version below and drag to draw.

items.title: 6969osc
items.description: Phone control surface with WebSocket + OSC (UDP) for TouchDesigner. Run locally; scan QR on the same Wi‑Fi.
items.fullDescription: 6969osc is a small Node.js server plus a phone controller UI. Run it on the venue machine, scan the QR code in the terminal, and drive TouchDesigner over OSC — no mobile app install required.
